_comment: Maps canonical section keys (used by product-knowledge-coverage.js) to the variant H2 headings actually present in each per-product PK file. Loader consults aliases ONLY when the canonical heading does not match. To add a new alias: pick the canonical key from the list below and append the alternate heading text (omit the leading '## '). Slug is the file name without 'plaid-' prefix or '.md' suffix.

customerUseCases: Demo guidance — Trust Index happy path (default)
accurateTerminology: Trust Index — initialization & API (canonical for `plaid_protect` demos)
